title: E-PATHSHALA
description: An online e-learning platform created to make education easier, more accessible, and engaging for everyone. It uses technology to remove barriers like distance and cost, offering a wide range of courses and resources.

title: E-PATHSHALA APP
description: Mobile application version of the E-PATHSHALA e-learning platform, bringing accessible education to mobile devices with Flutter-based cross-platform support.

title: Spell Checker (Word2Vec)
description: An intelligent spell checker application leveraging Word2Vec embeddings for context-aware spelling correction and word suggestions using NLP techniques.

title: DevVerse
description: A developer-centric platform designed for collaboration, code sharing, and community building among developers.

title: Restaurant Management System
description: A comprehensive restaurant management system built with PHP for handling orders, menu management, billing, and customer tracking.

title: Course Management System
description: A console-based C++ project for managing courses and student enrollment. Features include adding, updating, deleting, and viewing courses with file handling and OOP concepts.

title: Digital Image Processing
description: Research and implementation of digital image processing techniques including filtering, edge detection, segmentation, and computer vision algorithms.
